extract: Beedrill (Japanese: スピアー Spear) is a dual-type Bug/Poison Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Kakuna starting at level 10. It is the final form of Weedle. Beedrill can Mega Evolve into Mega Beedrill using the Beedrillite. Mega Beedrill was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.
